title: Maths practice - Ministry of Education
content:
The Maths practice website is for children in Years 3 to 8. It offers quick access to hundreds of activities based on the New Zealand Curriculum.
We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## Using the Maths practice site #
You can use the website to help your child practise what they have learned at school.
It is best to work together on the year level your child has just finished at school, not the year they're about to start.
After your child completes each question or puzzle, you will see a summary page suggesting next steps.
You can use the Maths practice site on your tablet, laptop or phone.
The Maths practice website is a pilot that will run for 6 months. So we can see how useful it is for families.

### Activities for Years 3 to 8 #
You and your child can practise the following Maths activities:
- grouping to count larger quantities
- multiplying and dividing whole numbers
- decimals and percentages
- rounding and estimation
- squared and cubed numbers
- multiples and factors.
Help your child practise what they have learned at school.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 0 to 8
- Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 0 to 8
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 9 to 10
- Guide to Te Marautanga o Aotearoa – Tau 9 to 10
- Parents and caregivers
